items.title: CMA Fest 2027: The Ultimate Country Music Weekend
items.desc: Every summer, Nashville doesn’t just host CMA Fest — it becomes CMA Fest. The city pulses with the rhythm of guitars and fiddles, every street corner alive with music, every block buzzing with fans who’ve traveled from around the world. From sunrise strums to midnight encores, it’s an unbroken celebration of country music’s past, present, and future. Lower-Level Stadium Passes (Thurs & Fri), Fan Fair X Access, and 3-Night Stay in Downtown Nashville for 2 This Experience for 2 Includes: ● Lower Level (100s) stadium passes to CMA Fest at Nissan Stadium for Thursday, June 3, 2027, and Friday, June 4, 2027 ● Fan Fair X admission for both Thursday and Friday — meet & greets, acoustic sets, interviews, exclusive merch, and air-conditioned comfort inside Music City Center ● Access to all CMA Fest indoor and outdoor stages — 200+ artists across downtown Nashville’s daytime and nighttime shows ● 3-night stay (Wednesday - Saturday) in a standard guest room at a downtown Nashville hotel ● Winspire booking & concierge service — seamless support for every detail, from securing passes to sharing local recommendations The Legacy of CMA Fest As the longest-running country music festival, CMA Fest is more than a weekend — it’s a tradition. Four days where Nashville turns into the beating heart of the genre, filled with nonstop performances, unforgettable fan moments, and stories waiting to be told. Nissan Stadium: Where Legends Play With lower-level passes for Thursday and Friday, you’ll step into the electric glow of Nissan Stadium — the big stage where country’s brightest stars deliver career-defining performances. Every night is packed with showstopping sets, surprise collaborations, and the kind of magic that only happens once a year, under the stadium lights. Fan Fair X: Up Close and Personal Inside the Music City Center, Fan Fair X pulls you behind the curtain of country music. Step into cool air conditioning and warmer connections — intimate acoustic sets, candid artist interviews, and exclusive meet & greets that bring fans face-to-face with both icons and rising stars. It’s country music at its most personal. Seating and sessions are first come, first served, but with hundreds of performances and experiences citywide, the music never stops. Stay in the Heart of Music City For three nights, your home is downtown Nashville, surrounded by the city’s most legendary spots. Step outside and you’re on Broadway, where neon lights blaze and honky-tonks spill live music into the streets. Savor authentic barbecue, take in the historic Ryman, and let the nightlife carry you long after the stadium shows end. Nashville doesn’t go quiet – it keeps singing, just for you. WINSPIRE PACKAGE REDEMPTION: This package is date specific. If the event were to be canceled or held without spectators, it would be honored for the following year. items.title: The Ultimate Dove Hunting Experience
items.desc: Imagine the sky alive with movement- doves soaring in endless waves across sunlit fields. This is the pinnacle of dove hunting, a thrilling adventure where the action never stops, and the experience is as luxurious as it is exhilarating. Your Choice of Guided Dove Hunting in Argentina or Uruguay for 5 Days with Meals and 5-Night Stay for 2 This Experience for 2 Includes: ● Five nights lodging from a selection of premier lodges in Argentina or Uruguay ● Five days of high-volume dove hunting (up to 9 total hunts) ● Professional field guides and daily gun cleaning ● Hunting licenses included ● Transfers to and from dove fields ● All meals and beverages (alcoholic & non-alcoholic) ● Daily laundry service ● Roundtrip airport transfers ● Winspire booking & concierge service The Hunt Dawn breaks over the open fields, painting the horizon in shades of gold and crimson. The air is still, broken only by the distant coo of doves and the soft murmur of your guide - a local expert who knows these lands like an old friend. After a hearty breakfast, you’ll head into the field, where endless skies and rolling farmland stretch as far as the eye can see. Then, the action begins. The first flight appears like a rising storm - a blur of wings cutting through the morning light. Your pulse quickens, instincts sharpen, and for the next several hours, time disappears into the rhythm of the hunt. Thousands of doves fill the air, offering nonstop excitement as you test your skill, focus, and endurance. Warm weather year-round, fertile landscapes, and carefully managed hunting zones create ideal conditions for this once-in-a-lifetime experience. Whether you’re a seasoned marksman or a first-time sportsman, each moment delivers pure adrenaline - the thrill of the chase, the camaraderie of the field, and the quiet satisfaction of a perfect shot beneath the boundless sky. Your Lodge Retreat After an exhilarating day in the field, return to your hunting lodge - a sanctuary of warmth, comfort, and camaraderie. The moment you step inside, the air is filled with the aroma of simmering sauces and woodsmoke drifting from the open hearth. Settle into the glow of the fire with a glass of fine wine or a cold local beer as stories from the day’s hunt flow as easily as the conversation. Your five-night stay includes all the comforts of home - from gourmet meals and daily laundry service to attentive staff who make every detail effortless. Outside, the pool glistens in the fading light; inside, a rustic elegance welcomes you to unwind and recharge. Evenings are a celebration of flavor and tradition. Gather for candlelit, chef-prepared dinners where open- fire grilled meats, handcrafted breads, and vibrant sides are paired perfectly with regional wines. Each meal ends on a high note - decadent desserts that have become nearly as famous as the hunt itself. Under a canopy of stars, with laughter in the air and good company all around, it’s the perfect blend of rugged adventure and refined indulgence.Please note: This package excludes gun rental fees, Shotgun shells, airfare as well as gratuities for guides and house staff. Hunters must be 15 years or older. Package Blackout Dates: The week of major holidays and major local events. Additional dates may apply. The package includes admission to the park (not valid on holidays or special event days). Family pass is not combinable with other offers. Don't forget to pick up some sandwiches for a picnic at the park with a $15 Subway gift card included with this package.

items.title: Summer Boys Clothes
items.desc: Enjoy clothes for the summer in multiple sizes for your little boy. Included a yellow & white striped romper w/snaps, size 24 months; beige, button down, collared short, sleeve shirt w/ matching gray shorts and gray bucket style hat, size 24 months; 2 piece, long sleeve swim shirt, UPF 40+, multi-colored with matching swim shorts, size 2T; Bluey beige, button down, collared, short sleeve shirt with Bluey all over print design with matching navy blue shorts, size 3T.

items.title: Hot Wheels Track & Sets
items.desc: Hot Wheels Triple Set with three different set: Hot Wheels Energy Track; the Hot Wheels Gator Set and the Hot Wheels Scorpion Flex Attack set. With The Hot Wheels Energy Track Set kids can launch cars down the track, brave a double-loop stunt, blast through the ring of fire and speed toward the finish line! In the Hot Wheels Gator Loop Attack playset, a giant alligator has positioned itself in the Hot Wheels pizza place to devour cars unless kids can stop it with their awesome stunting skills. the The Scorpion Flex Attack track can release cars from the gravity drop at the end of the tail and choose one of two exit routes that send cars careening through the police station and free from Sven's claws.

items.title: Little Tikes Bluey Beach Water Table
items.desc: Keep little ones entertained for hours outdoors with this Little Tikes Bluey Beach Water Table. Splash with Bluey, this water table’s fun design is accessible to multiple kids, includes themed accessories that encourage imaginative play and fun sensory experience with water and sand (not included) Features: four Bluey characters that easily float in the Lazy River; 2-in-1 design allows for an easy switch between table and floor play; a crab and an alligator cast; sand shovel and fill cup. Details: Age 1+ & up; 25.75”H x 27.75”W x 7”D; PVC materials; some assembly required.

items.title: Nakkas Cini Floral Ceramic Dish Set
items.desc: This exquisite dish set is made by Nakkas Cini in Turkey, renowned for their ceramic craftsmanship. The set includes 6 tidbit dishes and 4 cereal bowls, all adorned with a beautiful floral design. These pieces are dishwasher safe for easy cleaning but are not intended for microwave or oven use. Add a touch of Turkish charm to your dining experience with this delightful set.

items.title: Outdoor Folding End Tables
items.desc: A set of two anti gravity folding outdoor end tables from Sonoma Goods for Life. These light, yet strong, tables fold for easy storage and are perfect for outdoor use. Each table measures 21.5 inches high by 18.5 inches wide. They are also equipped with two drink holders for added convenience.

items.title: Bluey Party
items.desc: It's a Bluey party with this Bluey wooden tea party set with 18 charming wooden pieces. Plus Includes Talking Bluey 12" Plush & Talking Bingo 12" Plush. Features 9 different phrases, sing along to theme song.

items.title: Play Pizza Oven & Playdoh Blender
items.desc: Let your foodie Imagination take over with a Play Pizza Oven and Play-Doh Swirln' Smoothies playset. Kids will love the pizza oven and topping station for budding pizza-enthusiasts who like to get creative in the kitchen. This Casdon Ooni Pizza Oven and Topping Station make organization and customization a breeze. Made from recycled plastics, this set comes complete with pizza oven, topping station, realistic tools, recipe cards, and 42+ pizza toppings. Flame on! The pizza oven has a realistic flame-effect light which adds a magical touch. Suitable for ages 3+ and 3-AAA batteries required (not included). Plus Play-Doh Swirlin' Smoothies playset for your foodie kiddos.

items.title: Duplo Market & Big Emotions Set
items.desc: Introduce toddlers to shopping play with Lego Duplo My First Organic Market toy. This cute farmer’s market lets kids recreate the real world as they weigh items on the scales, pay with toy coins of different values and take their food home in a cute textile bag (details:age1 ½+; stacking toy; plastic; 40 pcs). Use another Duplo set to help toddlers explore their emotional responses with the Lego Duplo My First Big Feelings & Emotions cognitive learning toy (details: 4 expressive characters; stacking toy with 23 bricks).

items.title: The Big One Kid’s Book Rack
items.desc: Keep your kiddo’s books neat and tidy with a book rack from the Big One. This is a stylish solution for storing children’s books in a nursery, play area, or family room. Features: made of wood & canvas; 6 oversized pockets; and a built-in anti-tip kit for safety. Details: 30.5” x 28.7”W x 12.6”D; weight capacity:5lbs. per layer; some assembly required.

items.title: Old Gristmill Bread Company Bakery Basket
items.desc: A curated basket from Old Gristmill Bread Company in Kaysville, including a selection of fresh baked breads and bakery items. Perfect for enjoying artisanal treats at home or gifting to a bread enthusiast. (Be sure to pick up this yummy basket of baked goods the day of the Gala for the best product freshness.)

items.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
items.desc: Gabby's Dollhouse comes to life with Groovy Music Room toy and Party Room Playset. Music Room Playset includes drum set, a piano with dancing kitties and a jukebox that transforms into a karaoke state. Comes with 1 room, 1 figure, 2 furniture pieces, 2 Dollhouse deliveries. Gabby's Party Room features a skate ramp, stage & skating rink! Features cute accessories like a claw machine, & Skater Gabby & Marty the Party Cat figures with working skates!

items.title: Outdoor Summer Set
items.desc: Get in the swing of summer with this outdoor summer set. Features Tropicool Playground chalks - 16 pack; Tiny Wubble bubble ball for inside or out; Finn the Shark Megasplash Blaster; Stevie the Stringray large kite; and the Reef Gang Kids' Tic Tac Toe game.

items.title: X Shot Waterblaster  & Bubbleblaster
items.desc: Have some water fun with these water blasters and Mega Bubbleblaster. Features two SHOT Fast-Fill Skins Nano Sonic Hedgehog Water Blaster. Plus X-Shot Nano Fast-Fill Water Blaster Double Pack. Includes XSHOT Fast-Fill Skins Hyperload Water Blaster Unicorn Splash. Best for last with the Mega Bubble Blaster for hours of entertainment.

items.title: Be a Lunch Angel
items.desc: 10 dollars will feed a child lunch for a week.
